_meta.purpose: Per-district source table for the Nassau address feature. Every field carries a source_ref (url, vintage, verified date). A field with no verifiable primary source is omitted, never estimated. See .claude/scratch/districts-provenance.md for the full per-field fetch log.
_meta.keying: Objects are keyed by the Census school-district NAME as returned by the US Census geocoder district layers; geoid is the fallback key. sdType records which TIGER layer the district lives in: unified, elementary, or secondary.

schema.dtfName: district name as printed in the NYS DTF STAR tables
schema.starCredit: 2025 final STAR credit, Class 1 (Homestead for the two cities), dollars: {basic, enhanced}
schema.starExemptSavings: 2025 final STAR exemption savings, Class 1: {basic, enhanced}
schema.starMaxExemptSavings2026_27: DTF maximum 2026-27 STAR exemption savings, Class 1: {basic, enhanced}
schema.medianValue: ACS 2020-24 5-yr B25077 median owner-occupied home value for the place FIPS named in source_refs (a place-level proxy where the district spans multiple places; district-geography cross-check logged in source_refs)
schema.schoolRate: school tax rate per $100 of county assessed value, from one representative in-district Nassau LRV parcel; tax year 2026 = school year 2025-26
schema.libraryRate: library tax rate per $100 county AV from the same LRV parcel
schema.levy: school district tax levy, dollars, fiscal year ending 2025 = 2024-25 school year (NYS OSC via data.ny.gov iq85-sdzs); multi-municipality districts are the sum of their segment rows
schema.enrollment: {cur: 2024-25 K-12, base: 2015-16 K-12} per NYSED data site (BEDS day counts)
schema.enhStarExemptParcels: Enhanced STAR EXEMPTION-program parcel count for the district, 2025 levy year, from NYS data.ny.gov aa3i-eamx (number_of_enhanced_exemptions). This is the legacy exemption path only (seniors who receive STAR as a bill reduction), NOT the STAR-credit-check path and NOT a total senior-owned or 467-eligible count. It is per ledger row f-nassau-parcels and is NOT the FOIL-gated exemption-gap aggregate.

_meta.coverage: Full or near-full rows: all 55 DTF-listed Nassau districts. Two districts carry a documented rate scope-gap (Glen Cove city roll, Amityville Suffolk territory); Long Beach City SD carries the city-roll rate caveat from the pilot.
notes: DTF lists 55 taxing school districts for Nassau; the Nassau BOCES directory counts 56 districts. The three central high school districts (Bellmore-Merrick, Sewanhaka, Valley Stream CHSD) do not appear as separate DTF STAR rows: their levies ride on their component elementary districts’ bills. Addresses in those areas resolve through the Census elementary + secondary layers, not the unified layer.

Amityville and Cold Spring Harbor are Suffolk-home-county districts with Nassau territory; their 2025 STAR rows here come from the DTF Nassau page, but DTF publishes their 2026-27 max exemption savings on the Suffolk page (sd52), which is out of scope, so that field is omitted for them.
The DTF max-savings page spells one district “Floral Park-Bellrose”; normalized here to the comparison-table spelling “Floral Park-Bellerose”.

FOIL-gated §467 aggregates (parcel counts, exemption-gap dollars) are intentionally absent from this file on every framing. The per-district enhStarExemptParcels field is the published Enhanced-STAR exemption-program count only; it is not the 467-eligible subset and does not constitute an exemption-gap dollar figure.

Long Beach City SD schoolRate scope: the logged rate is the COUNTY-roll rate paid by the district’s Town of Hempstead portion (Lido Beach / Point Lookout). The City of Long Beach assesses its own roll; a city-parcel rate on the city AV basis is not yet verified and is omitted.

county_leg is present only where the repo’s same-day-verified officials table covers it (RVC, LD-1). Other districts’ county legislators are an officials-lane task, re-verified same-day before any politician-facing use.

Amityville and Cold Spring Harbor are Suffolk-home-county districts. Beyond the 2026-27 max-exemption omission, Amityville's levy and school/library parcel rate are also omitted: no Nassau Class-1 parcel resolves to the district (its territory is in Suffolk) and the OSC Nassau levy row conflicts with the district's true Suffolk levy.

Glen Cove City SD schoolRate/libraryRate scope: Glen Cove assesses its own city roll; the county LRV returns 'located within the City of Glen Cove' with no school tax lines, so a rate on the city AV basis is not verifiable from the county source and is omitted (same archetype as the Long Beach City SD city-roll gap). The OSC levy is still recorded.

Elementary-district schoolRate asymmetry: the three Sewanhaka/Valley-Stream/Bellmore-Merrick component elementary districts (e.g. Franklin Square, New Hyde Park-Garden City Park, Floral Park-Bellerose, Valley Stream 24/30) show a SINGLE combined Net School Tax line on the Nassau county bill (elementary + central-high-school-district billed together, not itemized). The recorded schoolRate is that combined rate; confirmed where the parcel's STAR-savings line matches the DTF elementary-district exempt savings.

Structural library absence: several districts show no Net Library Tax line on the sampled Class-1 parcel (library funded outside the school tax). For these the numeric libraryRate is OMITTED and a libraryRateNote records the verified absence; the schoolRate source_ref documents the parcel checked.

Amityville Union Free School District.note: Suffolk-home-county district; only the district-wide ACS median and NYSED enrollment are Nassau-verifiable. Levy and parcel tax rate are Nassau-out-of-scope gaps (see gaps).
gaps: levy: OSC lists a Nassau/Oyster Bay row ($19,648,866) but Census TIGER places Amityville UFSD entirely in Suffolk (bbox lon -73.43..-73.40); the district's true levy is on the Suffolk OSC dataset (out of scope). Omitted rather than record a conflicting Nassau-county figure.

schoolRate/libraryRate: no Nassau Class-1 parcel resolves to Amityville school district (probed the SW county-line area); LRV covers Nassau parcels only and this district's territory is in Suffolk. Omitted.
Amityville Union Free School District.town: Town of Babylon (Suffolk home county); the OSC Nassau row is filed under Town of Oyster Bay

Bellmore Union Free School District.sdStructure: Elementary (K-6) district inside the Bellmore-Merrick Central High School District. On the Nassau LRV parcel bill the elementary and CHSD portions are consolidated into a single Net School Tax line and cannot be separated at the parcel level, so schoolRate is the COMBINED elementary + CHSD Class-1 rate. The levy figure here is the elementary district's own levy (OSC iq85-sdzs); the CHSD levy is billed and reported separately.

Merrick Union Free School District.sdStructure: Elementary (K-6) district inside the Bellmore-Merrick Central High School District. On the Nassau LRV parcel bill the elementary and CHSD portions are consolidated into a single Net School Tax line and cannot be separated at the parcel level, so schoolRate is the COMBINED elementary + CHSD Class-1 rate. The levy figure here is the elementary district's own levy (OSC iq85-sdzs); the CHSD levy is billed and reported separately.

Valley Stream Union Free School District.libraryRateNote: No Net Library Tax line appears on this district's parcel bills (structural absence, not a fetch miss); library funding is not a separate line on the LRV school-tax bill for this district.
Valley Stream Union Free School District.sdStructure: Elementary (K-6) district inside the Valley Stream Central High School District. On the Nassau LRV parcel bill the elementary and CHSD portions are consolidated into a single Net School Tax line and cannot be separated at the parcel level, so schoolRate is the COMBINED elementary + CHSD Class-1 rate. The levy figure here is the elementary district's own levy (OSC iq85-sdzs); the CHSD levy is billed and reported separately.
Valley Stream Union Free School District.jurisdictionNote: District covers central Valley Stream, including parts of the incorporated Village of Valley Stream and unincorporated North Valley Stream.
Valley Stream Union Free School District.parcelLabelNote: LRV parcel label reads "VALLEY STREAM UFSD 13". Three elementary districts (13, 24, 30) overlap the Valley Stream hamlet; seed points were Census-geocoded to District-13 schools (e.g. Howell Road School) and every gate-confirmed parcel showed the identical 1640.379 rate.
